news-global-econ.title: ESPN must hold Stephen A. accountable after doubling down on racist remarks about White basketball players
news-global-econ.description: Stephen A. Smith doubles down on claims the Los Angeles Lakers cannot win with Luka Doncic, Walker Kessler, and Austin Reaves as their top three players.

news-global-econ.title: Scott Dixon leaving Chip Ganassi Racing throws a huge wrench into IndyCar's silly season
news-global-econ.description: Scott Dixon is leaving Chip Ganassi Racing after 25 seasons, with reports pointing to Arrow McLaren alongside Pato O'Ward and Felix Rosenqvist.

news-korea-soc.title: ‘Libelous’ NYT report tying Trump family to government-backed deal sparks legal demand
news-korea-soc.description: The Trump Organization demands The New York Times retract a story allegedly linking Donald Trump Jr. and Eric Trump to a Kazakhstan tungsten deal.

news-global-soc.title: Dana White says Donald Trump wouldn't stop pushing to make the White House UFC event bigger
news-global-soc.description: Dana White reveals how Donald Trump pushed for a bigger stage at UFC Fight Night at the White House as a storm split around the Ellipse during the event.

news-global-soc.title: New sodium-ion battery could reshape grid storage
news-global-soc.description: CATL launches TENER, the first commercially ready sodium-ion battery energy storage system designed for grid storage and renewable energy support.

news-global-soc.title: George Washington's remarkable prayer for America still resonates 250 years later
news-global-soc.description: The painting of George Washington deep in heartfelt prayer at Valley Forge headlines the Museum of the Bible's exhibit celebrating America's 250th anniversary.
